issues.description: Condition should check for presence of a black Navy type Character other than [Ripper] on board. Current condition is 'Always', which ignores the deck-building requirement. Should use 'HasCardOnBoard' with appropriate filters.
Trigger should be 'Trigger' (continuous effect) or 'StartOfTurn', not 'OnPlay'. The Blocker is granted as a static ability based on board state, not a one-time play effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have a black {Navy} type Character other than [Ripper], this Character gains [Blocker].
